title: T5: Text-to-Text Transfer Transformer
description: Google introduced T5, treating every NLP task as a text-to-text problem. This unified approach achieved state-of-the-art results across many benchmarks. The paper also introduced the famous C4 (Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus) dataset for pre-training.
highlights: All NLP tasks treated as generation

sources.title: Exploring the Limits of Transfer Learning
